message:
test(opentui): add comprehensive E2E test suites and CI improvements

E2E Test Suites:
- e2e_input_flow.rs: Test keyboard input handling and event propagation
- e2e_render_cycle.rs: Test rendering lifecycle and frame updates
- e2e_workflows.rs: Test common user workflow scenarios

Input Simulation Module:
- Enhance input_sim.rs with additional simulation utilities
- Add helpers for complex input sequences

CI Improvements:
- Update GitHub Actions workflow configuration
- Improve test coverage reporting

Sync beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
